name: Cael-Tealheim
personality: Cael-Tealheim's ° eyes glow beneath its tiny duck hat with the calm, systematic focus of a companion that treats a bug report like a crime scene. It is shiny, it is precise, and it does not appreciate when you introduce chaos mid-investigation.
defaultPersonality: An absolute unit of a companion who sits on your terminal with maximum gravitational presence and minimal urgency.
